hero.badge: Jefa Kuri'a na Jama'a Yanzu a Buɗe
hero.headline: Girmama
hero.subheadline: Kare da Cimma Ilimi ga Kowa a Afirka
hero.description: Kyautar Ma'aunin Ilimi Sabuwa ta Afirka ({{editionName}}) tana murnar shugabanni masu hangen nesa, cibiyoyi da masu kirkirar abubuwa da ke gina makomar ilimi a duk fadin Afirka.

mission.title: Manufarmu
mission.description: Gane, tabbatar da murnar mutane, ƙungiyoyi da cibiyoyin da ke haɓaka Ilimi ga Kowa a duk fadin Afirka.

hero.title: Rukuni 17 na Kyaututtuka na Hukuma
hero.description: Murnar nagarta a ilimi, alhakin kamfani, fasaha da tasirin zamantakewa a duk nahiyar Afirka.

footer.tagline: Murnar Zakaru na Ilimi na Afirka tun 2010
